title: European gas gains as a cold snap boosts demand
section_path: European gas gains as a cold snap boosts demand
section_path_text: European gas gains as a cold snap boosts demand
summary:
Main
By Daniel Hynes
Investors took time to re-evaluate the macroeconomic backdrop following recent strong gains across the commodities complex. The spectre of tighter monetary policy weighed on sentiment. Crude oil fell as concerns of weaker economic growth offset ongoing supply side issues.
